TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_ciluciluk, title = ciluciluk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/ciluciluk} }

S.FORM: == ciluciluk == Passer montanus (mitesekay a ngangan)passer montanus . (tada ngangan)Shu-maque, Huo-cui, Jiabin, wa-que, liu-que, jia-qiao, laojia-zi, laojia-zei, zhao-ye, Magu, nanmaque, Bin-que, Cuo-niao, Huo-chun, wujiao-niao, Wuyan-niao, u nu cilukciluka mikeliday tu cilukcilukan. kaliwasak cilukciluk kaliwasak maudip han i Ou-ya ta-lu, Ou-cou, Cung-ya, Tung-nan-ya, Tung-ya maadih tu numita ku cilukcilukan. i pabaw nu kilang a sidibu, udip nida mikiadidi tu duma a ayama, udip nu banuhan a kulit u he-se a kulitan atu sanglacay a kulitan, picidekan tu duma a ayam han, cilukciluk anuisasatu u lebut ku kawaw nuheni. wayway adidi ku udip nu cilukciluk, tanayu nu udipan han sabaw tu sepat a congfen, wayway nu udip han apuyu mamulmul, u tada mukanay tu tipusan a ayaman. cilucilik nu tatayna tatama malecad nami ku kulit, tunguhan atu nikudan nu lalielan u lise a kulitan, bihid u sanglacay a kulit, teban han idaw ku lumeniay a kulitan, nina lumeniay a kulitan i bihid han u sapakatineng tu u ciluciluk kuynian sa. saan kumi kinkiway itini i masakaputay nu cilucilukan han idaw ku lumeniay a takulawan u mililitay kuyda, u lumeni' han kapah kunika lumenian. . pabaw nu udip han u hese, idaw ku tintintin sananay nu lumeniay, hamin nu sakubat a banuh, adidiay nu banuh, atu mahka tahekalay nu banuhan u lumeniay hese a kulitan. tusa ku sisulitay nu sanglacay a sakubat, kikul han u hese, sasa' han sanglacay, mata han u micidek ku he-se, sangucud mamucuy ku wayway, tabak, lumeni', kuku' han kala he-se. kakanen cancanan ku makanay nu ciluciluk, cacaya a mihcaan caay namin kalecad ku kan, sadingsing pasabaan a puu'an u cilekay ku kanen, adidi ku mulangaway nu kilangan inai ku siheniay, tada kakanen nu ciluciluk han u cilekay ku kane nuheni. balangbangan kasienawan a puu'an han, u canan nu langawan nipalumaan nu tademaw a langawan idaw tu ku heci, cilekay han inai tu maadih, tawya satu u kakanen nuheni sa u cancanan nu langawan a pa'nu, heci, cancanan tu a langawan nuheci ku kanen. aydaay nui maciay a ciluciluk maudip han mananam tu aimaci amaudip, matineng tu mikilim tuni bakahan nu tademaw micudcud mukan, yadahtu ku kakanen sa caay tu pipili' tu puu'an amikilim tu kakanen. mibuwah atu midiput ciluciluk kasi ti'kukan han i tulu~sepat a bulad asiti'kuk. misa dibu ku nuheni han u damud, maacakay nu ciid nu kilang ku sasangan tu dibuan nuheni, misadibu ku nuheni sai itida i helak atu nisangaan nu tademaw a buhangan , alahican itida i kikaykikayan, intucan, buhan nu sangsiban, kalingesan tu nu tademaw pacebasa asidibu. ciluciluk han nu cacayay a dibuan han lima ~enem ku ti'kuk, sanglacay ku kulit nika si tintintin, sabaw tusa a demian matiti'tu tu wawa u pakanay han yadah tu mikilim tu yadahany nu cilekay sapakan tunuhenian. matineng mabuwah ku ciluciluk, yadah ku nikabewahan nu ciluciluk, sisa caaya kaw malawpesay a ayaman. itini i Cung-guo , nama kayda inipi dakepan tu cilicilk tu tusa a walwalan sa, ayda hantu mawadatu ku ciluciluk caay tu kayadah, itida i zhongguo-nanfang a tukayan naitu maadih ku cilucilukan. babenis ahebal kuni ka udipan nu ciluciluk, nu cilucilukan han u hekal caay ka yadah kuni ka sumadan, nu waluay a cilucilukan nu canganhan caay ka hacica kunika babenisan. nu sabaw tu limaay a sakatusa nu ayaman idaw ku patahekalay musakamu anipatedeng, nika u ciluculuk han u nipasilsilen tu sakatusa nu i tebanay a ayaman. icuwa a maudip ku ciluciluk ciluciluk han u micacapiay tu tademawan a ayaman, manamuh i katuuday nu tademawan a maudip, kadabuan nuhen atu kakanen nuheni sa itinitu i lumaluman. anu maudip itida i masaenalay a kitidaan, i buyu'buyu' caay ka hinaadih kita tu cilucilukan. tada micapitu tu tademawan ku ciluciluk, itini sa i tademawan a maudip, sisa idaw ku panganganay nu tademaw han u "mabahelay nu edu". ciluciluk nika udipan han itini i Ou-cou atu Ya-cuo, Ou-cuou, Cong-dong (inutebanan nu wali), Dong-nan-ya, Dong-ya maadih namin numita ku ciluciluk, Cong-guo kitakidan idaw ku kina ciluciluk. nu Ou-cou a cilucilukan han itida i umaumahan maudip. itiniay i Ya-cou a niyaduan, itiniay a cilucilukan i tukayan hina adih kita tu cilucilukan. itini i Dong-nan-ya nu tukayan, niyaduan, atu hekal maadih nimita ku ciluciluk, masaupu'tu i telaytelayan mucekaw, micidek tu sananal. i Aw-cou han itida i hekal atu inaiay nu tademawan a maudip, i tukay han caay kita pakaadih tu cilucilukan. alahican maadih numita i kilakilanga a sidibu, sisa u ciluciluk nu cacaya a mihcaan nu puu'an maluyaluuytu kunuheni a maudip. u yadahay nu buhang a kilang, u kanamuhan nu ciluciluk kasidibuan a kitidaan. u dibu nuheni caay kaw masiluday, yadah ku sapisanga nuheni tu dibuan, idaw ku lutuk, maacakay nu lutuk, banuh nu sidi/sizi, banuh nu ayam. alahican itida i ba'ba'tuan asidibu, i lamit nu kilang, atu lumalumaan, suluan nu salinignan. tunikasi ti'kukan han sepat~ enem ku ti'kuk, lima sa ku yadahay. kiya caay pakaadih ku tademaw tu kidu nu ciluciluk kanen nu ada nuhen, idaw henay ku patay sananay a cilucilukan caay ka adih nu tepai nu tademaw. tada adidi' tu ku ciluciluk, matineng mihamaw, manamuh i kilakilangan, i lutuklutukan mibatad tu tademawan maudip, anu mapatay satu, u kidu nuheni itida satu, hina telap nu langaw nu lutuk atu mahetikay nu papah. dumasatu anu mapatay ku ciluciluk u sadamekan tu, numukanay tu hecian a aadupansa, namapatay tu nu cilucilu han u kakanen nuheni tu. sakalahuk, manamuh ku aadupan mukan tu mapataya nu cilucilukan, milawpes tu kidu nuheni. cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna a taleacawaan malacad atu tademaw, ciluciluk han malecad tu cacay ku sakalacawa, pinaykya ku yadahay nu acawaan. uynihan wawa nu ciluciluk utiih a pahabayan. . wawa nu ciluciluk u cilekay ku kanen, yadah kunikan, sisa caay pisengal ku wina atu wama mikilim tu kakanen wawa, anu caay ka laluk mikilim tu kakanen nu wawa han pataysatu nu ngalay. idaw ku tamaan nu ciluciluk han yadahay ku acawa, numahidaay a lumaan han macacapi kunuheni a tusa nu lalumaan, sakalihalay midiput tu tusaay a tunuhenian, alahican mangeluen tu kunuheni a pahabay tu wawa nuheni, sisa caay kaw madiputay caaytu ka kapah nu nikaudipan. sadikuda nu sasakamuen amica hinaadih kita tu ciluculuk, yadahtu ku ciluciluk, nika u ada' nuheni han yadah tu u edu, tulakuk, nani' mukanay tu heci a aadupan, mukansa caay piliwan tu kiduan nuheni. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: == ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk == pass…ôr montanus (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)pass…ôr montanus . (tada ŇčaŇčan)sńßu-ma*u…ô, ńßuo- ¶ui, *iabin, wa-*u…ô, r~…ĺiu-*u…ô, jia-*iao, r~…ĺaojia-zi, r~…ĺaojia-z…ôi, zńßao-j…ô, magu, nanma*u…ô, bin-*u…ô, ¶uo-niao, ńßuo- ¶ńßun, wujiao-niao, wujan-niao, u nu ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺuka mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺukan. kar~…ĺiwasak ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺuk kar~…ĺiwasak maudip ńßan i ou-ja ta-r~…ĺu, ou- ¶ou, ¶uŇč-ja, tuŇč-nan-ja, tuŇč-ja maadińß tu numita ku ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺukan. i pabaw nu kir~…ĺaŇč a sidibu, udip nida mikiadidi tu duma a ajama, udip nu banuńßan a kur~…ĺit u ńß…ô-s…ô a kur~…ĺitan atu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan, pi ¶id…ôkan tu duma a ajam ńßan, kur~…ĺit, t…ôban ńßan idaw ku r~…ĺum…ôniaj a kur~…ĺitan, nina r~…ĺum…ôniaj a kur~…ĺitan i bińßid ńßan u sapakatin…ôŇč tu u ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk kujnian sa. saan kumi kinkiwaj itini i masakaputaj nu r~…ĺum…ôniaj, ńßamin nu sakubat a banuńß, adidiaj nu banuńß, atu mańßka tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu banuńßan u r~…ĺum…ôniaj ńß…ôs…ô a kur~…ĺitan. tusa ku sisur~…ĺitaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a sakubat, kikur~…ĺ ńßan u ńß…ôs…ô, sasa Ē~ ° ńßan saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, mata ńßan u mi ¶id…ôk ku ńß…ô-s…ô, saŇču ¶ud mamu ¶uj ku wajwaj, tabak, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, kuku Ē~ ° ńßan kar~…ĺa ńß…ô-s…ô. kakan…ôn ¶an ¶anan ku makanaj nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, ¶a ¶aja a mińß ¶aan ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kan, sadiŇčsiŇč pasabaan a puu Ē~ °an u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn, adidi ku mur~…ĺaŇčawaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčan inai ku sińß…ôniaj, tada kakan…ôn nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ńßan u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ô nuńß…ôni. bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan kasi…ônawan a puu Ē~ °an ńßan, u ¶anan nu r~…ĺaŇčawan nipar~…ĺumaan nu tad…ômaw a r~…ĺaŇčawan idaw tu ku ńß…ô ¶i, ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ńßan inai tu maadińß, tawja satu u kakan…ôn nuńß…ôni sa u ¶an ¶anan nu r~…ĺaŇčawan a pa Ē~ °nu, ńß…ô ¶i, ¶an ¶anan tu a r~…ĺaŇčawan nuńß…ô ¶i ku kan…ôn. ajdaaj nui ma ¶iaj a ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk maudip ńßan mananam tu aima ¶i amaudip, matin…ôŇč tu mikir~…ĺim tuni bakańßan nu tad…ômaw mi ¶ud ¶ud mukan, jadańßtu ku kakan…ôn sa ¶aaj tu pipir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu puu Ē~ °an amikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn. mibuwańß atu midiput ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk kasi ti Ē~ °kukan ńßan i tur~…ĺu~s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad asiti Ē~ °kuk. misa dibu ku nuńß…ôni ńßan u damud, maa ¶akaj nu ¶iid nu kir~…ĺaŇč ku sasaŇčan tu dibuan nuńß…ôni, misadibu ku nuńß…ôni sai itida i ńß…ôr~…ĺak atu nisaŇčaan nu tad…ômaw a buńßaŇčan , ar~…ĺańßi ¶an itida i kikajkikajan, intu ¶an, buńßan nu saŇčsiban, kar~…ĺiŇč…ôsan tu nu tad…ômaw pa ¶…ôbasa asidibu. ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ńßan nu ¶a ¶ajaj a dibuan ńßan r~…ĺima ~…ôn…ôm ku ti Ē~ °kuk, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit nika si tintintin, sabaw tusa a d…ômian matiti Ē~ °tu tu wawa u pakanaj ńßan jadańß tu mikir~…ĺim tu jadańßanj nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj sapakan tunuńß…ônian. matin…ôŇč mabuwańß ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, jadańß ku nikab…ôwańßan nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, sisa ¶aaja kaw mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a ajaman. itini i ¶uŇč-guo , nama kajda inipi dak…ôpan tu ¶ir~…ĺi ¶ir~…ĺk tu tusa a war~…ĺwar~…ĺan sa, ajda ńßantu mawadatu ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶aaj tu kajadańß, itida i zńßoŇčguo-nanfaŇč a tukajan naitu maadińß ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan. bab…ônis ańß…ôbar~…ĺ kuni ka udipan nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan ńßan u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶aaj ka jadańß kuni ka sumadan, nu war~…ĺuaj a ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan nu ¶aŇčanńßan ¶aaj ka ńßa ¶i ¶a kunika bab…ônisan. nu sabaw tu r~…ĺimaaj a sakatusa nu ajaman idaw ku patańß…ôkar~…ĺaj musakamu anipat…ôd…ôŇč, nika u ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ur~…ĺuk ńßan u nipasir~…ĺsir~…ĺ…ôn tu sakatusa nu i t…ôbanaj a ajaman. i ¶uwa a maudip ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ńßan u mi ¶a ¶apiaj tu tad…ômawan a ajaman, manamuńß i katuudaj nu tad…ômawan a maudip, kadabuan nuńß…ôn atu kakan…ôn nuńß…ôni sa itinitu i r~…ĺumar~…ĺuman. anu maudip itida i masa…ônar~…ĺaj a kitidaan, i buju Ē~ °buju Ē~ ° ¶aaj ka ńßinaadińß kita tu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan. tada mi ¶apitu tu tad…ômawan ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, itini sa i tad…ômawan a maudip, sisa idaw ku paŇčaŇčanaj nu tad…ômaw ńßan u "mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu …ôdu". ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk nika udipan ńßan itini i ou- ¶ou atu ja- ¶uo, ou- ¶uou, ¶oŇč-doŇč (inut…ôbanan nu war~…ĺi), doŇč-nan-ja, doŇč-ja maadińß namin numita ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, ¶oŇč-guo kitakidan idaw ku kina ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk. nu ou- ¶ou a ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan ńßan itida i umaumańßan maudip. itiniaj i ja- ¶ou a nijaduan, itiniaj a ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan i tukajan ńßina adińß kita tu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan. itini i doŇč-nan-ja nu tukajan, nijaduan, atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ maadińß nimita ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, masaupu Ē~ °tu i t…ôr~…ĺajt…ôr~…ĺajan mu ¶…ôkaw, mi ¶id…ôk tu sananar~…ĺ. i aw- ¶ou ńßan itida i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu inaiaj nu tad…ômawan a maudip, i tukaj ńßan ¶aaj kita pakaadińß tu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an maadińß numita i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇča a sidibu, sisa u ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk nu ¶a ¶aja a mińß ¶aan nu puu Ē~ °an mar~…ĺujar~…ĺuujtu kunuńß…ôni a maudip. u jadańßaj nu buńßaŇč a kir~…ĺaŇč, u kanamuńßan nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk kasidibuan a kitidaan. u dibu nuńß…ôni ¶aaj kaw masir~…ĺudaj, jadańß ku sapisaŇča nuńß…ôni tu dibuan, idaw ku r~…ĺutuk, maa ¶akaj nu r~…ĺutuk, banuńß nu sidi/sizi, banuńß nu ajam. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an itida i ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °tuan asidibu, i r~…ĺamit nu kir~…ĺaŇč, atu r~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan, sur~…ĺuan nu sar~…ĺinignan. tunikasi ti Ē~ °kukan ńßan s…ôpat~ …ôn…ôm ku ti Ē~ °kuk, r~…ĺima sa ku jadańßaj. kija ¶aaj pakaadińß ku tad…ômaw tu kidu nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk kan…ôn nu ada nuńß…ôn, idaw ńß…ônaj ku pataj sananaj a ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan ¶aaj ka adińß nu t…ôpai nu tad…ômaw. tada adidi Ē~ ° tu ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, matin…ôŇč mińßamaw, manamuńß i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, i r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan mibatad tu tad…ômawan maudip, anu mapataj satu, u kidu nuńß…ôni itida satu, ńßina t…ôr~…ĺap nu r~…ĺaŇčaw nu r~…ĺutuk atu mańß…ôtikaj nu papańß. dumasatu anu mapataj ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk u sadam…ôkan tu, numukanaj tu ńß…ô ¶ian a aadupansa, namapataj tu nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺu ńßan u kakan…ôn nuńß…ôni tu. sakar~…ĺańßuk, manamuńß ku aadupan mukan tu mapataja nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan, mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu kidu nuńß…ôni. ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna a tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan mar~…ĺa ¶ad atu tad…ômaw, ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ńßan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶a ¶aj ku sakar~…ĺa ¶awa, pinajkja ku jadańßaj nu a ¶awaan. ujnińßan wawa nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk utiińß a pańßabajan. . wawa nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn, jadańß kunikan, sisa ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ ku wina atu wama mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn wawa, anu ¶aaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺuk mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn nu wawa ńßan patajsatu nu Ňčar~…ĺaj. idaw ku tamaan nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ńßan jadańßaj ku a ¶awa, numańßidaaj a r~…ĺumaan ńßan ma ¶a ¶api kunuńß…ôni a tusa nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj midiput tu tusaaj a tunuńß…ônian, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an maŇč…ôr~…ĺu…ôn tu kunuńß…ôni a pańßabaj tu wawa nuńß…ôni, sisa ¶aaj kaw madiputaj ¶aajtu ka kapańß nu nikaudipan. sadikuda nu sasakamu…ôn ami ¶a ńßinaadińß kita tu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ur~…ĺuk, jadańßtu ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, nika u ada Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni ńßan jadańß tu u …ôdu, tur~…ĺakuk, nani Ē~ ° mukanaj tu ńß…ô ¶i a aadupan, mukansa ¶aaj pir~…ĺiwan tu kiduan nuńß…ôni. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == ciluciluk == Passer montanus (mitesekay a ngangan)passer montanus . (tada ngangan)Shu-maque, Huo-cui, Jiabin, wa-que, liu-que, jia-qiao, laojia-zi, laojia-zei, zhao-ye, Magu, nanmaque, Bin-que, Cuo-niao, Huo-chun, wujiao-niao, Wuyan-niao, u nu cilukciluka mikeliday tu cilukcilukan. kaliwasak cilukciluk kaliwasak maudip han i Ou-ya ta-lu, Ou-cou, Cung-ya, Tung-nan-ya, Tung-ya maadih tu numita ku cilukcilukan. i pabaw nu kilang a sidibu, udip nida mikiadidi tu duma a ayama, udip nu banuhan a kulit u he-se a kulitan atu sanglacay a kulitan, picidekan tu duma a ayam han, cilukciluk anuisasatu u lebut ku kawaw nuheni. wayway adidi ku udip nu cilukciluk, tanayu nu udipan han sabaw tu sepat a congfen, wayway nu udip han apuyu mamulmul, u tada mukanay tu tipusan a ayaman. cilucilik nu tatayna tatama malecad nami ku kulit, tunguhan atu nikudan nu lalielan u lise a kulitan, bihid u sanglacay a kulit, teban han idaw ku lumeniay a kulitan, nina lumeniay a kulitan i bihid han u sapakatineng tu u ciluciluk kuynian sa. saan kumi kinkiway itini i masakaputay nu cilucilukan han idaw ku lumeniay a takulawan u mililitay kuyda, u lumeni' han kapah kunika lumenian. . pabaw nu udip han u hese, idaw ku tintintin sananay nu lumeniay, hamin nu sakubat a banuh, adidiay nu banuh, atu mahka tahekalay nu banuhan u lumeniay hese a kulitan. tusa ku sisulitay nu sanglacay a sakubat, kikul han u hese, sasa' han sanglacay, mata han u micidek ku he-se, sangucud mamucuy ku wayway, tabak, lumeni', kuku' han kala he-se. kakanen cancanan ku makanay nu ciluciluk, cacaya a mihcaan caay namin kalecad ku kan, sadingsing pasabaan a puu'an u cilekay ku kanen, adidi ku mulangaway nu kilangan inai ku siheniay, tada kakanen nu ciluciluk han u cilekay ku kane nuheni. balangbangan kasienawan a puu'an han, u canan nu langawan nipalumaan nu tademaw a langawan idaw tu ku heci, cilekay han inai tu maadih, tawya satu u kakanen nuheni sa u cancanan nu langawan a pa'nu, heci, cancanan tu a langawan nuheci ku kanen. aydaay nui maciay a ciluciluk maudip han mananam tu aimaci amaudip, matineng tu mikilim tuni bakahan nu tademaw micudcud mukan, yadahtu ku kakanen sa caay tu pipili' tu puu'an amikilim tu kakanen. mibuwah atu midiput ciluciluk kasi ti'kukan han i tulu~sepat a bulad asiti'kuk. misa dibu ku nuheni han u damud, maacakay nu ciid nu kilang ku sasangan tu dibuan nuheni, misadibu ku nuheni sai itida i helak atu nisangaan nu tademaw a buhangan , alahican itida i kikaykikayan, intucan, buhan nu sangsiban, kalingesan tu nu tademaw pacebasa asidibu. ciluciluk han nu cacayay a dibuan han lima ~enem ku ti'kuk, sanglacay ku kulit nika si tintintin, sabaw tusa a demian matiti'tu tu wawa u pakanay han yadah tu mikilim tu yadahany nu cilekay sapakan tunuhenian. matineng mabuwah ku ciluciluk, yadah ku nikabewahan nu ciluciluk, sisa caaya kaw malawpesay a ayaman. itini i Cung-guo , nama kayda inipi dakepan tu cilicilk tu tusa a walwalan sa, ayda hantu mawadatu ku ciluciluk caay tu kayadah, itida i zhongguo-nanfang a tukayan naitu maadih ku cilucilukan. babenis ahebal kuni ka udipan nu ciluciluk, nu cilucilukan han u hekal caay ka yadah kuni ka sumadan, nu waluay a cilucilukan nu canganhan caay ka hacica kunika babenisan. nu sabaw tu limaay a sakatusa nu ayaman idaw ku patahekalay musakamu anipatedeng, nika u ciluculuk han u nipasilsilen tu sakatusa nu i tebanay a ayaman. icuwa a maudip ku ciluciluk ciluciluk han u micacapiay tu tademawan a ayaman, manamuh i katuuday nu tademawan a maudip, kadabuan nuhen atu kakanen nuheni sa itinitu i lumaluman. anu maudip itida i masaenalay a kitidaan, i buyu'buyu' caay ka hinaadih kita tu cilucilukan. tada micapitu tu tademawan ku ciluciluk, itini sa i tademawan a maudip, sisa idaw ku panganganay nu tademaw han u "mabahelay nu edu". ciluciluk nika udipan han itini i Ou-cou atu Ya-cuo, Ou-cuou, Cong-dong (inutebanan nu wali), Dong-nan-ya, Dong-ya maadih namin numita ku ciluciluk, Cong-guo kitakidan idaw ku kina ciluciluk. nu Ou-cou a cilucilukan han itida i umaumahan maudip. itiniay i Ya-cou a niyaduan, itiniay a cilucilukan i tukayan hina adih kita tu cilucilukan. itini i Dong-nan-ya nu tukayan, niyaduan, atu hekal maadih nimita ku ciluciluk, masaupu'tu i telaytelayan mucekaw, micidek tu sananal. i Aw-cou han itida i hekal atu inaiay nu tademawan a maudip, i tukay han caay kita pakaadih tu cilucilukan. alahican maadih numita i kilakilanga a sidibu, sisa u ciluciluk nu cacaya a mihcaan nu puu'an maluyaluuytu kunuheni a maudip. u yadahay nu buhang a kilang, u kanamuhan nu ciluciluk kasidibuan a kitidaan. u dibu nuheni caay kaw masiluday, yadah ku sapisanga nuheni tu dibuan, idaw ku lutuk, maacakay nu lutuk, banuh nu sidi/sizi, banuh nu ayam. alahican itida i ba'ba'tuan asidibu, i lamit nu kilang, atu lumalumaan, suluan nu salinignan. tunikasi ti'kukan han sepat~ enem ku ti'kuk, lima sa ku yadahay. kiya caay pakaadih ku tademaw tu kidu nu ciluciluk kanen nu ada nuhen, idaw henay ku patay sananay a cilucilukan caay ka adih nu tepai nu tademaw. tada adidi' tu ku ciluciluk, matineng mihamaw, manamuh i kilakilangan, i lutuklutukan mibatad tu tademawan maudip, anu mapatay satu, u kidu nuheni itida satu, hina telap nu langaw nu lutuk atu mahetikay nu papah. dumasatu anu mapatay ku ciluciluk u sadamekan tu, numukanay tu hecian a aadupansa, namapatay tu nu cilucilu han u kakanen nuheni tu. sakalahuk, manamuh ku aadupan mukan tu mapataya nu cilucilukan, milawpes tu kidu nuheni. cacay ku tatama cacay ku tatayna a taleacawaan malacad atu tademaw, ciluciluk han malecad tu cacay ku sakalacawa, pinaykya ku yadahay nu acawaan. uynihan wawa nu ciluciluk utiih a pahabayan. . wawa nu ciluciluk u cilekay ku kanen, yadah kunikan, sisa caay pisengal ku wina atu wama mikilim tu kakanen wawa, anu caay ka laluk mikilim tu kakanen nu wawa han pataysatu nu ngalay. idaw ku tamaan nu ciluciluk han yadahay ku acawa, numahidaay a lumaan han macacapi kunuheni a tusa nu lalumaan, sakalihalay midiput tu tusaay a tunuhenian, alahican mangeluen tu kunuheni a pahabay tu wawa nuheni, sisa caay kaw madiputay caaytu ka kapah nu nikaudipan. sadikuda nu sasakamuen amica hinaadih kita tu ciluculuk, yadahtu ku ciluciluk, nika u ada' nuheni han yadah tu u edu, tulakuk, nani' mukanay tu heci a aadupan, mukansa caay piliwan tu kiduan nuheni. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: == ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk == pass…ôr montanus (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)pass…ôr montanus . ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺuka mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺukan. kar~…ĺiwasak ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺuk kar~…ĺiwasak maudip ńßan i ou-ja ta-r~…ĺu, ou- ¶ou, ¶uŇč-ja, tuŇč-nan-ja, tuŇč-ja maadińß tu numita ku ¶ir~…ĺuk ¶ir~…ĺukan. i pabaw nu kir~…ĺaŇč a sidibu, udip nida mikiadidi tu duma a ajama, udip nu banuńßan a kur~…ĺit u ńß…ô-s…ô a kur~…ĺitan atu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan, pi ¶id…ôkan tu duma a ajam ńßan, tad…ômawan a maudip, sisa idaw ku paŇčaŇčanaj nu tad…ômaw ńßan u "mabańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu …ôdu". ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk nika udipan ńßan itini i ou- ¶ou atu ja- ¶uo, ou- ¶uou, ¶oŇč-doŇč (inut…ôbanan nu war~…ĺi), t…ôr~…ĺajt…ôr~…ĺajan mu ¶…ôkaw, mi ¶id…ôk tu sananar~…ĺ. i aw- ¶ou ńßan itida i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu inaiaj nu tad…ômawan a maudip, i tukaj ńßan ¶aaj kita pakaadińß tu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk kasidibuan a kitidaan. u dibu nuńß…ôni ¶aaj kaw masir~…ĺudaj, jadańß ku sapisaŇča nuńß…ôni tu dibuan, idaw ku r~…ĺutuk, maa ¶akaj nu r~…ĺutuk, banuńß nu sidi/sizi, banuńß nu ajam. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an itida i ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °tuan asidibu, i r~…ĺamit nu kir~…ĺaŇč, atu r~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan, sur~…ĺuan nu sar~…ĺinignan. tunikasi ti Ē~ °kukan ńßan s…ôpat~ …ôn…ôm ku ti Ē~ °kuk, r~…ĺima sa ku ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, matin…ôŇč mińßamaw, manamuńß i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, i r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan mibatad tu tad…ômawan maudip, anu mapataj satu, u kidu nuńß…ôni itida satu, ńßina t…ôr~…ĺap nu r~…ĺaŇčaw nu r~…ĺutuk atu mańß…ôtikaj nu papańß. dumasatu anu mapataj ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk u sadam…ôkan tu, numukanaj tu ńß…ô ¶ian a aadupansa, namapataj tu nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺu ńßan u kakan…ôn nuńß…ôni tu. sakar~…ĺańßuk, manamuńß ku aadupan mukan tu mapataja nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺukan, mir~…ĺawp…ôs tu kidu nuńß…ôni. ¶a ¶aj ku tatama ¶a ¶aj ku tatajna a tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan mar~…ĺa ¶ad atu tad…ômaw, ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ńßan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ¶a ¶aj ku sakar~…ĺa ¶awa, pinajkja ku jadańßaj nu a ¶awaan. ujnińßan wawa nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk utiińß a pańßabajan. . wawa nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk u ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj ku kan…ôn, jadańß kunikan, sisa ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ ku wina atu wama mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn wawa, anu ¶aaj ka r~…ĺar~…ĺuk mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn nu wawa ńßan patajsatu nu Ňčar~…ĺaj. idaw ku tamaan nu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk ńßan jadańßaj ku a ¶awa, numańßidaaj a r~…ĺumaan ńßan ma ¶a ¶api kunuńß…ôni a tusa nu r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj midiput tu tusaaj a tunuńß…ônian, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an maŇč…ôr~…ĺu…ôn tu kunuńß…ôni a pańßabaj tu wawa nuńß…ôni, sisa ¶aaj kaw madiputaj ¶aajtu ka kapańß nu nikaudipan. sadikuda nu sasakamu…ôn ami ¶a ńßinaadińß kita tu ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ur~…ĺuk, jadańßtu ku ¶ir~…ĺu ¶ir~…ĺuk, nika u ada Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni ńßan jadańß tu u …ôdu, tur~…ĺakuk, nani Ē~ ° mukanaj tu ńß…ô ¶i a aadupan, mukansa ¶aaj pir~…ĺiwan tu kiduan nuńß…ôni. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
